generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab#"

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted behavior of physical twin under current conditions"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety status assessment for system operation"
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal performance status assessment"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault in system operation"
]

instance CurrentStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state of the system determined through estimation"
]

instance OptimalConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal configuration parameters for system performance"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective action initiated for system control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StructuralDimensionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring structural dimensions for CAD-based geometric models",
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralDimensionDataTransmitted
]

instance DynamicBehaviorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring dynamic parameters for differential equation models",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DynamicBehaviorDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralDimensionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralDimensionSensor
]

instance DynamicBehaviorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DynamicBehaviorSensor
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating model parameters based on sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, OptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller for system operation based on supervisory logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System for monitoring safety and performance using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predictive simulation using models and data",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance StructuralCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model for structural dimensions",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEnabler
]

instance DynamicAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEnabler
]

instance StructuralDimensionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw structural dimension measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralDimensionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, MonitoringSystem
]

instance DynamicBehaviorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw dynamic behavior measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DynamicBehaviorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of physical twin behavior under current operating conditions",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization via algorithmic optimizers for system performance",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalConfigurationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through specialized detectors",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for system state determination",
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers for system operation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with best parameter estimates from sensor data, while monitors detect safety and optimization violations; corrective actions are initiated upon discrepancy detection."
]
